{# Overrides sphinx-book-theme's page-toc.html. SBT copy-pasted this component from pydata to make the title configurable, but its copy dropped the `bd-toc-nav` class that pydata's current template puts on the
. The still sets `data-bs-spy="scroll" data-bs-target=".bd-toc-nav"`, so without that class Bootstrap scrollspy targets nothing and the right-hand "On this page" highlight tracks erratically (e.g. top-level entries never activate). We restore `bd-toc-nav` here while keeping SBT's configurable title. -#} {% set page_toc = generate_toc_html() %} {%- if page_toc | length >= 1 %} {%- set page_navigation_heading_id = unique_html_id("pst-page-navigation-heading") -%}
{{ translate(theme_toc_title) }}
{{ page_toc }}
{%- endif %}
